_comment_LocalDB: Neu dung SQL Server LocalDB (Visual Studio), doi thanh: Server=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Database=LadiPageDB;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true
_comment_OnePay: Xem appsettings.Local.example.json — MerchantId, AccessCode, SecureSecretHex. CallbackBaseUrl = ngrok toi API.
